[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1001100 3
1 1111110 6
2 1000111 4
3 1111010 5
4 0011001 3
5 1111111 a
6 1111111 a
7 1111111 a

01 10 0111101 5
12 21 1111101 6
23 32 1111110 6 match 1
34 43 1110111 6
45 54 1111111 a match 5 6 7
56 65 0111101 5
67 76 1100111 5
70 07 1100111 5

72 27 1101110 5
